question_tagalog: Anong maliit na bagay ang ginagawa ko araw-araw na na-aappreciate mo nang sobra?
question_english: What small thing do I do every day that you appreciate so much?
quote_tagalog: Sa maliliit na bagay gawa ang malalaking pag-ibig.
quote_english: Great love is made of small things.

question_tagalog: Anong gesture ko ang unang nakapagpa-fall sayo nang tuluyan?
question_english: What gesture of mine first made you fall completely?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko man sinasadya, pero napaibig kita.
quote_english: I may not have intended it, but I made you fall.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na talagang pinaglaanan ko ng effort ang isang surprise para sayo?
question_english: When did you feel that I really put effort into a surprise for you?
quote_tagalog: Lahat gagawin mapangiti ka lang.
quote_english: Will do everything just to make you smile.

question_tagalog: Ano ang pinaka-favorite mong gift na nanggaling sakin?
question_english: What is your favorite gift that came from me?
quote_tagalog: Ang oras na binigay, higit pa sa materyal na bagay.
quote_english: Time given is more than material things.

question_tagalog: Paano mo mas gustong pinapakitaan ng pagmamahal? (Words, gifts, time, service, touch?)
question_english: How do you prefer being shown love? (Words, gifts, time, service, touch?)
quote_tagalog: Iibigin kita sa lengguwaheng naiintindihan mo.
quote_english: I will love you in the language you understand.

question_tagalog: Nakaka-appreciate ka ba ng handwritten letters o mas okay ang mahabang chat messages?
question_english: Do you appreciate handwritten letters or are long chat messages better?
quote_tagalog: Mga salitang isinulat para lang sayo.
quote_english: Words written just for you.

question_tagalog: Anong ginagawa ko pag pagod ka na nakakapawala ng stress mo?
question_english: What do I do when you are tired that removes your stress?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magsisilbing pahinga mo.
quote_english: I will serve as your rest.

question_tagalog: Na-notice mo ba pag sinasadya kong i-prepare ang paborito mong food kapag malungkot ka?
question_english: Do you notice when I purposely prepare your favorite food when you're sad?
quote_tagalog: Sa simpleng luto, pagmamahal ang sahog.
quote_english: In simple cooking, love is the ingredient.

question_tagalog: Anong klaseng pag-comfort ang paborito mo mula sakin kapag nagkakasakit ka?
question_english: What kind of comfort do you favor from me when you get sick?
quote_tagalog: Aalagaan kita hanggang sa gumaling ka.
quote_english: I will take care of you until you heal.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tinitimpla ang effort natin? 50/50 ba palagi dapat?
question_english: How do you balance our effort? Should it always be 50/50?
quote_tagalog: Minsan 80/20, salitan tayo pag pagod ang isa.
quote_english: Sometimes 80/20, we take turns when one is tired.

question_tagalog: Ano yung big effort na hindi napapansin ng iba pero nakikita mo sakin?
question_english: What big effort do others not notice but you see in me?
quote_tagalog: Basta alam mo, sapat na yon.
quote_english: As long as you know, that's enough.

question_tagalog: Anong random na bagay ang binili ko sayo na tanda mo pa rin?
question_english: What random thing did I buy for you that you still remember?
quote_tagalog: Kahit walang okasyon, aalalahanin kita.
quote_english: Even without occasion, I'll remember you.

question_tagalog: Paano ko napapagaan ang mga gawaing bahay o responsibilidad mo nang di mo hinihingi?
question_english: How do I lighten your chores or responsibilities without you asking?
quote_tagalog: Magtulungan tayo sa lahat ng bagay.
quote_english: Let's help each other in everything.

question_tagalog: Na-appreciate mo ba pag pumupunta ako sayo nang walang pasabi para makita ka lang?
question_english: Do you appreciate when I come to you unannounced just to see you?
quote_tagalog: Ang makasama ka, sapat ng dahilan para bumiyahe.
quote_english: Being with you is reason enough to travel.

question_tagalog: Anong compliment ko ang mas pinahahalagahan mo? Looks o yung sa character mo?
question_english: Which compliment of mine do you value more? Looks or character?
quote_tagalog: Ang ganda ng puso mo, yan ang totoo.
quote_english: Your heart is beautiful, that is the truth.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba kapag ako mismo nag-iinitiate na makipag-bonding sa family or friends mo?
question_english: Do you like it when I initiate bonding with your family or friends?
quote_tagalog: Mamahalin ko rin ang mga mahal mo sa buhay.
quote_english: I will also love those you love.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naisip na 'Swerte ko sakanya dahil sa ginagawa niya ngayon'?
question_english: When did you think 'I'm lucky to have him/her because of what he/she is doing now'?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang tunay na swerte sayo.
quote_english: I am the one truly lucky to have you.

question_tagalog: Paano ginagawa yung simpleng 'Acts of Service' na nagbibigay ngiti sa labi mo?
question_english: How are simple 'Acts of Service' done that bring a smile to your lips?
quote_tagalog: Aksiyon ay mas maingay pa kaysa salita.
quote_english: Action is louder than words.

question_tagalog: Mas nagmamarka ba ang dates natin na planned o yung spontaneous?
question_english: Do our planned dates leave a bigger mark or the spontaneous ones?
quote_tagalog: Basta tayo ang magkasama, masaya man o tahimik.
quote_english: As long as we're together, whether loud or quiet.

question_tagalog: Nararamdaman mo ba yung effort ko pag nagso-sorry ako whenever nagkakamali ako?
question_english: Do you feel my effort when I say sorry whenever I make a mistake?
quote_tagalog: Ang pagbaba ng pride ay senyales ng tunay na pagmamahal.
quote_english: Lowering pride is a sign of true love.

question_tagalog: Ano ang isang talent o skill ko na madalas mo i-brag sa ibang tao?
question_english: What is one talent or skill of mine that you often brag to other people?
quote_tagalog: Susuportahan kita hanggang makarating ka sa pangarap mo.
quote_english: I'll support you until you reach your dreams.

question_tagalog: Pag may conflict tayo, pano ka natotouch sa pag-eefort kong ayusin agad yun?
question_english: When we have conflict, how are you touched by my effort to fix it quickly?
quote_tagalog: Ayaw kong pinapatagal ang tampuhan nating dalawa.
quote_english: I don't want to prolong our misunderstandings.

question_tagalog: Anong word of affirmation mula sakin ang gusto mong pakinggan pag down ka?
question_english: What word of affirmation from me do you want to hear when you're down?
quote_tagalog: Nandito lang ako, naniniwala sayo.
quote_english: I am just here, believing in you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo sina-suklian yung sacrifices ko sayo unconsciously?
question_english: How do you repay my sacrifices unconsciously?
quote_tagalog: Pagmamahal mo ang tamang kabayaran sa lahat.
quote_english: Your love is the right payment for all.

question_tagalog: Are you comfortable pag ginagastos ko yung ipon ko para lang sa special date natin?
question_english: Are you comfortable when I spend my savings just for our special date?
quote_tagalog: Deserve nating i-celebrate ang pagmamahalan.
quote_english: We deserve to celebrate love.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tinitignan ang simpleng pagbitbit ko ng bag mo minsan?
question_english: How do you perceive my simple carrying of your bag sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Handa akong saluhin kahit anong bigat sayo.
quote_english: Ready to catch whatever is heavy on you.

question_tagalog: Ano ang reaction mo sa loob pag inaalok kita lagi ng jacket or payong ko?
question_english: What is your internal reaction when I always offer you my jacket or umbrella?
quote_tagalog: Poprotektahan kita sa ulan man o araw.
quote_english: Will protect you in rain or shine.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba yun inilalakad kita sa gilid palayo sa dumadaang sasakyan?
question_english: Do you like it when I walk you on the side away from passing cars?
quote_tagalog: Ligtas ka sa aking tabi.
quote_english: You are safe by my side.

question_tagalog: Ano yung habit ko dati na inalis ko kasi ayaw mo, at thankful ka dahil dun?
question_english: What habit did I remove before because you didn't like it, and you're thankful for it?
quote_tagalog: Magbabago ang tao para sa taong mahalaga.
quote_english: A person changes for someone important.

question_tagalog: Ano yung favorite kong gawin na nakikipag-compromise ka dahil for the sake of effort?
question_english: What is my favorite thing to do that you compromise for the sake of effort?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko kung saan ka masaya.
quote_english: I like wherever makes you happy.

question_tagalog: Na-realize mo ba na sinasa-ulo ko ang bawat schedules at likes mo araw-araw?
question_english: Did you realize I memorize all your schedules and likes every day?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng tungkol sayo ay mahalaga.
quote_english: Everything about you is important.

question_tagalog: Anong pinunta natin na lugar na nagustuhan mo dahil sa surprise element na ginawa ko?
question_english: What place did we go to that you liked because of the surprise element I did?
quote_tagalog: Sa bawat destinasyon, ikaw ang paborito kong kasama.
quote_english: In every destination, you're my favorite companion.

question_tagalog: Pag busy tayong dalawa, paano nakakapag-compensate yung simpleng 'good morning' ko sayo?
question_english: When we're both busy, how does my simple 'good morning' compensate?
quote_tagalog: Sa simula ng araw, ikaw una sa isip.
quote_english: At the start of the day, you're first on the mind.

question_tagalog: Ano yung best effort ko financially para maka-save tayo effectively?
question_english: What is my best effort financially so we can save effectively?
quote_tagalog: Paghahanda para sa ating kinabukasan.
quote_english: Preparing for our future.

question_tagalog: Is caring for your health and taking you to doctors an effort you cherish deeply?
question_english: Is caring for your health and taking you to doctors an effort you cherish deeply?
quote_tagalog: Health is wealth lalo pag kasama ka.
quote_english: Health is wealth especially with you.

question_tagalog: Anong small detail na usually male-late pansinin ng iba pero nahanap ko at binigyan ng effort?
question_english: What small detail is usually late for others to notice but I found and put effort into?
quote_tagalog: Nakatingin ako sa buong pagkatao mo.
quote_english: I am looking at your entire being.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba kung gano kalaki ineffort ko to stay up late during exams/work mo para lang damayan ka?
question_english: Do you think of how much effort I put to stay up late during your exams/work just to accompany you?
quote_tagalog: Puyat man, sulit naman ang bonding natin.
quote_english: Even if sleep deprived, our bonding is worth it.

question_tagalog: Kapag ako naman ang nangangailangan ng effort, ano ang best way that you provide it back to me?
question_english: When I'm the one needing effort, what is the best way that you provide it back to me?
quote_tagalog: Sa yakap mo lang asahan mo na.
quote_english: Just expect it on your hug.

question_tagalog: Anong trait ko yung pinaka-nakikitaan mo ng pure intention and effort?
question_english: What trait of mine do you see pure intention and effort the most?
quote_tagalog: Malinis na pagnanais na mahalin ka ng tapat.
quote_english: Clean intention to love you faithfully.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang batiin ko parents mo at bigyan sila gift the same way ginagawa ko sayo?
question_english: Do you want me to greet your parents and give them gifts the same way I do to you?
quote_tagalog: Isang pamilya rin turing ko sa kanila.
quote_english: I treat them as one family too.

question_tagalog: Paano ginagawa yung simpleng acts na magbubukas ng pinto at hihila ng upuan the right way for you?
question_english: How are simple acts like opening the door and pulling a chair done the right way for you?
quote_tagalog: Ang simpleng chivalry ay di pa patay.
quote_english: Simple chivalry is not dead yet.

question_tagalog: Kailan ako naging sobrang attentive na pati breathing and silence mo nararamdaman ko na?
question_english: When did I become so attentive that I notice even your breathing and silence?
quote_tagalog: Kilalang-kilala na kita mula ulo hanggang paa.
quote_english: I know you so well from head to toe.

question_tagalog: Pinapansin mo ba the moment na hinahawi ko hair mo sa mukha mo?
question_english: Do you notice the moment I swipe your hair out of your face?
quote_tagalog: Maliit na paraan ng aking paghanga.
quote_english: Small way of my admiration.

question_tagalog: Ano ang reaksyon mo nung ginawa ko para sayo yung first 'out of character' move ko to impress you?
question_english: What was your reaction when I did my first 'out of character' move just to impress you?
quote_tagalog: Para sayo, handa akong mag-iba ng nakagawian.
quote_english: For you, I am ready to change my routine.

question_tagalog: Mas nakikita mo ba ang pagmamahal ko sa daily routines o sa grand gestures tuwing okasyon?
question_english: Do you see my love more in daily routines or in grand gestures during occasions?
quote_tagalog: Ang tunay na pag-ibig, nasa pang-araw-araw na aksyon.
quote_english: True love lies in everyday actions.

question_tagalog: Naalala mo ba that one time na inayos ko ang shoelaces mo confidently in a random place?
question_english: Do you remember that one time I confidently tied your shoelaces in a random place?
quote_tagalog: Luluhod pa nga lang, wag lang madapa yung nag-iisa kong mahal.
quote_english: I'd even kneel down so my only love won't fall.

question_tagalog: Are you thankful with how I protect you pag nasa crowded or cramped situation tayo?
question_english: Are you thankful with how I protect you when we are in a crowded or cramped situation?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang shield mo laban sa gulo.
quote_english: I am your shield against chaos.

question_tagalog: Kailan ko literal na sinakripisyo yung lakad or personal time ko para lang makasama ka that unexpected moment?
question_english: When did I literally sacrifice my plans or personal time just to be with you in that unexpected moment?
quote_tagalog: Priority kita, higit pa sa lahat ng plano.
quote_english: You're my priority, more than all plans.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tinetake pag pilit ko tayong bibilhan ng matching items just to show we are coupled up?
question_english: How do you take it when I force buying us matching items just to show we are coupled up?
quote_tagalog: Korni man minsan basta malaman nilang sakin ka ahaha.
quote_english: Even if it's corny sometimes, as long as they know you're mine hahaha.

question_tagalog: Ano pa yung simpleng gestures na hindi ko madalas gawin na gusto mo try ko soon?
question_english: What other simple gestures that I rarely do but you want me to try soon?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo lang, pag-aaralan ko yan.
quote_english: Just say it, I will learn it.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging subject sa school ang 'How I Care for You', ako ba ang highest score doon sa effort?
question_english: If 'How I Care for You' becomes a subject in school, would I get the highest score in effort?
quote_tagalog: Perfect attendance ako pag dating sayo.
quote_english: I have perfect attendance when it comes to you.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba safe ka physically as long as andyan presence ko?
question_english: Do you feel physically safe as long as my presence is there?
quote_tagalog: Ang bisig ko, tahanan mo sa gabi.
quote_english: My arms, your home at night.

question_tagalog: Nakita mo na ba akong umiyak kasi naramdaman ko na na-appreciate mo intensely ang effort ko?
question_english: Have you seen me cry because I felt you intensely appreciated my effort?
quote_tagalog: Luha sa saya ay hindi kasalanan.
quote_english: Tears in joy is not a sin.

question_tagalog: Ano yung routine before sleep na ginawa natin that proved we are made for each other?
question_english: What was the pre-sleep routine we made that proved we are made for each other?
quote_tagalog: Tapang ng kape, lambot ng yakap.
quote_english: Strength of coffee, softness of hug.

question_tagalog: Nararamdaman mo ba yung efforts kong pasayahin ka tuwing may sakit ako, tipong lumilipat na sa yo the illness ko?
question_english: Do you notice my efforts to cheer you up when I'm sick, as if transmitting my illness to you playfully?
quote_tagalog: Hahawaan nalang kita ng tawa instead ng virus.
quote_english: I will infect you with laughter instead of a virus.

question_tagalog: Did you ever silently stare at me while admiring how patiently I fix things around us?
question_english: Did you ever silently stare at me while admiring how patiently I fix things around us?
quote_tagalog: Pagmamasid sa pag-aayos mo sa paligid at pati buhay natin.
quote_english: Watching you fix our surroundings and even our life.

question_tagalog: Kailan kang sumigaw at pinagtanggol kita completely at ginawan ng solusyon before you break down completely?
question_english: When did you scream and I completely defended you and brought out a solution before you break down completely?
quote_tagalog: Papatunayan ang pagkabalyero para sa ikabubuti mo.
quote_english: Proving chivalry for your better.

question_tagalog: Pwede mo bang ire-create ang one memory that you will remember how much respect I showed to your space before?
question_english: Can you recreate one memory that you will remember how much respect I showed to your space before?
quote_tagalog: Ang respeto ay isa din na patunay ng pagiging totoo.
quote_english: Respect is also proof of being true.

question_tagalog: Would you always be fine accepting help from me or minsan you just want to do things all alone and show your strength to me playfully?
question_english: Would you always be fine accepting help from me or sometimes you just want to do things alone playfully to demonstrate your strength?
quote_tagalog: I am so proud of your independence right now as an amazing strong person inside.
quote_english: I am so proud of your independence right now as an amazing strong person inside.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tatanungin humbly kung ako na the specific standard for you on my romantic efforts?
question_english: How will you humbly ask if I am already the specific standard for you on my romantic efforts?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang pamantayan sa puso kong tapat forever.
quote_english: You alone are the standard in my forever loyal heart.
